title: pentas lanceolata var. angustifolia
intro: Pentas lanceolata var. angustifolia, also known as East Indian heliotrope or narrow-leaved pentas, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant has been found to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, offering health benefits such as wound healing, fever reduction, and immune system support. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal purposes, as well as being used in traditional remedies for its perceived healing properties.
